get.description:
Fetch qualifiers by hash(es).

Supports single hash (e.g., /resolve/qualifiers/123) or comma-separated batch
(e.g., /resolve/qualifiers/123,456,789).

Returns array of qualifier dicts in request order; null for missing hashes.
Max 100 hashes per request.

schema.title: Response Get Qualifiers V1 Entitybase Resolve Qualifiers  Hashes  Get

get.description:
Fetch references by hash(es).

Supports single hash (e.g., /resolve/references/123) or comma-separated batch
(e.g., /resolve/references/123,456,789).

Returns array of reference dicts in request order; null for missing hashes.
Max 100 hashes per request.

schema.title: Response Get References V1 Entitybase Resolve References  Hashes  Get

get.description:
Fetch snaks by hash(es).

Supports single hash (e.g., /resolve/snaks/123) or comma-separated batch
(e.g., /resolve/snaks/123,456,789).

Returns array of snak dicts in request order; null for missing hashes.
Max 100 hashes per request.

schema.title: Response Get Snaks V1 Entitybase Resolve Snaks  Hashes  Get

get.description:
Fetch statements by hash(es).

Supports single hash (e.g., /resolve/statements/123) or comma-separated batch
(e.g., /resolve/statements/123,456,789).

Returns array of statement dicts in request order; null for missing hashes.
Max 100 hashes per request.

schema.title: Response Get Statements V1 Entitybase Resolve Statements  Hashes  Get

get.description:
Fetch sense glosses by hash(es).

Supports single hash (e.g., /resolve/glosses/123) or comma-separated batch
(e.g., /resolve/glosses/123,456,789).

Returns array of gloss strings in request order; null for missing hashes.
Max 100 hashes per request.

schema.title: Response Get Glosses V1 Entitybase Resolve Glosses  Hashes  Get

get.description:
Fetch form representations by hash(es).

Supports single hash (e.g., /resolve/representations/123) or comma-separated batch
(e.g., /resolve/representations/123,456,789).

Returns array of representation strings in request order; null for missing hashes.
Max 100 hashes per request.

schema.title: Response Get Representations V1 Entitybase Resolve Representations  Hashes  Get

get.description:
Get batch labels by hashes.

Supports single hash (e.g., /resolve/labels/123) or comma-separated batch
(e.g., /resolve/labels/123,456,789).

Returns dict mapping hash strings to label text. Max 20 hashes per request.

Get batch descriptions by hashes.

Supports single hash (e.g., /resolve/descriptions/123) or comma-separated batch
(e.g., /resolve/descriptions/123,456,789).

Returns dict mapping hash strings to description text. Max 20 hashes per request.

Get batch aliases by hashes.

Supports single hash (e.g., /resolve/aliases/123) or comma-separated batch
(e.g., /resolve/aliases/123,456,789).

Returns dict mapping hash strings to alias text lists. Max 20 hashes per request.

Get batch sitelink titles by hashes.

Supports single hash (e.g., /resolve/sitelinks/123) or comma-separated batch
(e.g., /resolve/sitelinks/123,456,789).

Returns dict mapping hash strings to sitelink titles. Max 20 hashes per request.

get.description:
Get statement hashes for multiple entities.

Query params:
- entity_ids: Comma-separated entity IDs (e.g., Q1,Q2,Q3). Max 20.
- property_ids: Optional comma-separated property IDs to filter (e.g., P31,P279).

Returns dict mapping entity_id → property_id → list of statement hashes.
Entities not found return empty dict for that entity_id.

Example: GET /statements/batch?entity_ids=Q1,Q2&property_ids=P31
Returns: {"Q1": {"P31": [123, 456]}, "Q2": {"P31": [789]}}
Retrieve a single statement by its content hash.

post.summary: Import a single entity (item, property, or lexeme)
post.description:
Import a single entity of any type.

This unified endpoint accepts items, properties, and lexemes.
The entity type is determined by the 'type' field in the request.

Supported entity types:
- item: Q-prefixed entities (e.g., Q42)
- property: P-prefixed entities (e.g., P31)
- lexeme: L-prefixed entities (e.g., L123)

Parameters:
- id: Entity ID (required for import, auto-assignment not supported)
- type: Entity type (item, property, lexeme)
- labels: Language-specific labels
- descriptions: Language-specific descriptions
- claims: Statements/claims
- sitelinks: Site links (items only)
- forms: Forms (lexemes only)
- senses: Senses (lexemes only)
- lemmas: Lemmas (lexemes only)
- aliases: Aliases

Returns:
- EntityResponse with created entity data

Errors:
- 409: Entity already exists
- 400: Validation error

get.description:
Debug endpoint to check entity in database.

This endpoint queries the entity_id_mapping table directly to verify
if an entity exists and what its internal_id is.

schema.title: Response Debug Entity V1 Entitybase Debug Entity  Entity Id  Get

aliases.title: Aliases

labels.title: Labels

older_than_days.description: Minimum age in days before cleanup (default 180)

limit.description: Maximum number of statements to cleanup (default 1000)

cleaned_count.title: Cleaned Count
cleaned_count.description: Number of statements cleaned up from S3 and Vitess

failed_count.title: Failed Count

errors.title: Errors
errors.description: List of error messages for failed cleanups

value.title: Value
value.description: The description text for the specified language

EditType.title: EditType
EditType.description: Enumeration of different types of edits that can be made to entities.

hash.title: Hash
hash.description: Hash of the statement for which endorsements are listed. Example: 12345

user_id.title: User Id
user_id.description: ID of the user whose endorsements are listed. Example: 67890

more.title: More
more.description: Whether there are more endorsements to fetch. Example: true

id.title: Id
id.description: Unique identifier for the endorsement. Example: 12345.

user_id.title: User Id
user_id.description: ID of the user who created the endorsement. Example: 67890.

hash.title: Hash
hash.description: Hash of the endorsed statement. Example: 987654321.

created_at.title: Created At
created_at.description: Timestamp when the endorsement was created (ISO format). Example: '2023-01-01T12:00:00Z'.

removed_at.title: Removed At
removed_at.description: Timestamp when the endorsement was removed (ISO format), empty string if active. Example: '2023-12-31T23:59:59Z'.

user_id.title: User Id
user_id.description: ID of the user for whom statistics are provided. Example: 12345

given.title: Given
given.description: Total number of endorsements given by the user. Example: 10

active.title: Active
active.description: Number of active endorsements given by the user. Example: 8

id.title: Id
id.description: Entity ID (e.g., Q42) - optional for creation, auto-assigned if not provided

is_mass_edit.title: Is Mass Edit
is_mass_edit.description: Whether this is a mass edit

is_autoconfirmed_user.title: Is Autoconfirmed User
is_autoconfirmed_user.description: User is autoconfirmed (not a new/unconfirmed account)

is_mass_edit_protected.title: Is Mass Edit Protected
is_mass_edit_protected.description: Whether the entity is mass edit protected

is_deleted.title: Is Deleted
is_deleted.description: Whether entity is deleted. Example: true.

user_id.title: User Id
user_id.description: User ID who made the change. Example: 67890.

EntityHistoryEntry.title: EntityHistoryEntry
EntityHistoryEntry.description: Response model for a single entity history entry.

revision_id.title: Revision Id
revision_id.description: The revision ID of the created entity

entities.title: Entities

EntityListResponse.description: Response model for entity list queries.

redirect_from_id.title: Redirect From Id
redirect_from_id.description: Source entity ID to be marked as redirect (e.g., Q59431323)

EntityRedirectResponse.description: Response model for entity redirect creation.

rev_id.title: Rev Id
rev_id.description: Revision ID of the entity. Example: 12345.

state.description: Entity state information (optional, may be None for revisions).

EntityRevertRequest.title: EntityRevertRequest
EntityRevertRequest.description: Request to revert an entity to a previous revision.

entity_id.title: Entity Id
entity_id.description: ID of the reverted entity. Example: 'Q42'.

new_rev_id.title: New Rev Id
new_rev_id.description: New revision ID after revert. Example: 12345.

from_rev_id.title: From Rev Id
from_rev_id.description: Original revision ID before revert. Example: 67890.

sp.title: Sp
sp.description: Whether the entity is semi-protected. Example: true.

locked.title: Locked
locked.description: Whether the entity is locked. Example: false.

archived.title: Archived
archived.description: Whether the entity is archived. Example: false.

dangling.title: Dangling
dangling.description: Whether the entity is dangling. Example: false.

mep.title: Mep
mep.description: Whether the entity has mass edit protection. Example: true.

deleted.title: Deleted
deleted.description: Whether the entity is deleted. Example: true.

EntityStatusRequest.title: EntityStatusRequest
EntityStatusRequest.description: Request model for entity status changes (lock, archive, semi-protect).

rev_id.title: Rev Id
rev_id.description: Revision ID after status change. Example: 12345.

idempotent.title: Idempotent
idempotent.description: True if entity was already in the target state (no new revision created).

EntityStatusResponse.title: EntityStatusResponse
EntityStatusResponse.description: Response model for entity status changes (lock, archive, semi-protect).

representations.title: Representations
representations.description: Form representations by language code, e.g. {'en': {'language': 'en', 'value': 'runs'}}

grammatical_features.title: Grammatical Features
grammatical_features.description: List of grammatical feature item IDs (e.g. ['Q123'])

FormCreateRequest.description: Request body for creating a new form.

total_terms.title: Total Terms
total_terms.description: Total number of terms (labels + descriptions + aliases).

terms_by_type.description: Terms count by type (labels, descriptions, aliases).

GeneralStatsResponse.description: API response for general wiki statistics.

HealthCheckResponse.title: HealthCheckResponse
HealthCheckResponse.description: Detailed response model for health check.

value.title: Value
value.description: The label text for the specified language

LexemeLanguageRequest.description: Request body for updating a lexeme's language.

statements.title: Statements

claim.description: The new claim data to replace the existing statement. Must be a valid Wikibase claim JSON.

PatchStatementRequest.description: Request model for patching a statement.

property_counts.title: Property Counts
property_counts.description: Dict mapping property ID -> statement count

property_hashes.title: Property Hashes
property_hashes.description: List of statement hashes for specified properties

qualifier.title: Qualifier
qualifier.description: Full qualifier JSON object with reconstructed snaks. Values may be int, str, dict, or list containing reconstructed snaks.

hash.description: Hash of the qualifier content. Example: 123456789.

created_at.title: Created At
created_at.description: Timestamp when qualifier was created. Example: '2023-01-01T12:00:00Z'.

hash.title: Hash
hash.description: Hash of the reference content. Example: 123456789.

created_at.title: Created At
created_at.description: Timestamp when reference was created. Example: '2023-01-01T12:00:00Z'.

RemoveStatementRequest.description: Request model for removing a statement.

revision_id.title: Revision Id
revision_id.description: The revision ID of the created/updated entity, or 0 for idempotent operations

RevisionIdResult.description: Model for operations that return a revision ID.

revision.title: Revision
revision.description: Complete revision data including entity and metadata.

hash.title: Hash
hash.description: Hash of the revision content. Example: 123456789.

created_at.title: Created At
created_at.description: Timestamp when revision was created. Example: '2023-01-01T12:00:00Z'.

S3RevisionData.description: Model for revision data stored in S3.

glosses.title: Glosses

SenseCreateRequest.description: Request body for creating a new sense.
